steps.description: Leave Waterdeep by the northern gates and take the High Road along the coast.
Depart Waterdeep by the southern gate and join the Trade Way.
Leave Waterdeep on the Long Road and pass patrol posts north of the city.
Depart Waterdeep's harbor into the Sea of Swords.
Hire protected passage from Waterdeep toward the Dessarin waterways.
Follow the Sword Coast winds above the High Road.
Ride high coastal winds between the great ports.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Silverymoon.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Baldur's Gate.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Suzail.
Follow the coastal road south until Waterdeep's walls rise ahead.
Pass the Mere of Dead Men and make for Leilon's rebuilt streets.
Turn inland from the High Road onto the Triboar Trail.
Leave Leilon and rejoin the High Road between marsh and sea.
Keep north along the coast until Neverwinter's warm river air reaches the road.
Take the High Road south from Neverwinter toward Leilon.
Follow the northern coast road to the quarries and docks of Port Llast.
Leave the city roads and enter the old shade of Neverwinter Wood.
Sail out from Neverwinter's harbor into the Sea of Swords.
Follow the Sword Coast winds above the High Road.
Turn south from Port Llast and keep the sea to your right toward Neverwinter.
The road bends north through colder wind toward Luskan and the River Mirar.
Leave Luskan's hard docks behind and follow the coast road south.
Leave Luskan's docks and take the northern sea lane.
Take a small craft from Luskan up the River Mirar.
Follow the northbound caravans back toward Waterdeep.
Keep to the river valley until Daggerford's walls and bridge come into view.
Leave Daggerford and return to the main southbound Trade Way.
Cross the Delimbiyr at Daggerford and continue south toward the Coast Way.
Follow the Delimbiyr valley inland from Daggerford.
Turn from Daggerford toward the mist-softened forest tracks.
Leave the Trade Way's shelter and approach the High Moor.
Launch at Daggerford onto the Delimbiyr.
Turn north from the Coast Way and make for Daggerford's river crossing.
Follow the Coast Way to the traffic and tolls outside Baldur's Gate.
Take the watched spur west from the Coast Way toward Candlekeep.
Leave Baldur's Gate by the Coast Way and pass beyond the city watch.
Cross the River Chionthar at Wyrm's Crossing and leave Baldur's Gate by the Risen Road.
Head south from Baldur's Gate into the damp shade of Cloak Wood.
Leave the city eastward toward the Wood of Sharp Teeth.
Sail down the Chionthar and out into the Sea of Swords.
Take a river boat from Baldur's Gate onto the Chionthar.
Ride high coastal winds between the great ports.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Baldur's Gate.
Return from the Candlekeep spur to the busier Coast Way.
Climb the coastal approach toward Candlekeep's gates and guarded custom.
Descend from Candlekeep's walls and rejoin the road spur.
Follow the Long Road south until Waterdeep dominates the horizon.
Continue north through road inns and horse country toward Amphail.
Ride or walk south from Amphail toward Rassalantar's roadside shelters.
The Long Road runs through open country toward Red Larch and its quarries.
Leave Red Larch and follow the Long Road back toward Amphail's horse farms.
Keep north across the Dessarin Valley toward Triboar's caravan yards.
Turn south from Triboar and stay on the Long Road toward Red Larch.
Travel north along the Long Road toward odd signs and Longsaddle.
Leave Triboar westbound on the old trail toward Phandalin and the High Road.
Travel east from Triboar toward Yartar and the Dessarin crossings.
Leave Triboar's firm roads for the uncertain ground of the Evermoors.
Leave Longsaddle and follow the Long Road south toward Triboar.
The road hardens northward toward Mirabar's mining traffic.
Follow the Long Road south from Mirabar toward Longsaddle.
Travel east through hard northern roads toward Silverymoon.
Follow mining tracks and dwarven signs toward Mithral Hall.
Climb toward the Spine of the World through thin air and colder stone.
Leave Mirabar by river craft on the Mirar.
Follow the Triboar Trail west until it meets the High Road.
Leave the main trail on the mining track toward Phandalin.
Follow the trail east until Triboar's road markers and stockyards appear.
Climb from Phandalin back to the Triboar Trail.
Follow the Risen Road west and cross Wyrm's Crossing into Baldur's Gate.
Keep east along the Risen Road toward Elturel and Chionthar patrols.
Leave Elturel westbound and rejoin the Risen Road.
Travel upriver through guarded farms and road camps toward Scornubel.
Turn north from Elturgard roads toward the Forest of Wyrms.
Launch from Elturel onto the Chionthar.
Leave Scornubel's caravan yards and follow the Chionthar route west to Elturel.
Press east along the river road toward Berdusk's cultured streets.
Head north from Scornubel into rough Trollclaws country.
Leave Scornubel's trade camps and approach the Reaching Woods.
Follow the twisting waterway north from Scornubel's trade roads.
Push off from Scornubel into the Chionthar current.
Take river passage east toward Berdusk.
Follow the Chionthar route west from Berdusk toward Scornubel.
Continue inland toward Iriaebor's steep merchant streets.
Board a downriver craft from Berdusk toward Scornubel.
Descend from Iriaebor and follow the western road back toward Berdusk.
Travel from Iriaebor toward the broken Greycloak Hills.
Climb east from the Heartlands toward the Sunset Mountains.
Follow the Delimbiyr back west toward Daggerford.
Leave the safer valley road and approach the lonely High Moor.
Leave the road for a boat on the Delimbiyr.
Find the Delimbiyr valley road at the moor's edge.
Turn west from the moor and seek Daggerford's river road.
Leave Yartar westbound and follow the road toward Triboar.
Cross the river traffic at Yartar and take the Evermoor Way east.
Leave Yartar's river traffic for wet tracks east of town.
Launch from Yartar onto the Dessarin route.
Follow the Evermoor Way west until Yartar's walls and bridges appear.
Skirt the Evermoors and press on toward Everlund.
Leave Everlund and take the westbound road toward the Evermoors.
Travel west from Everlund through the Rauvin valley toward Silverymoon.
Continue east through fortified northern traffic toward Sundabar.
Approach the High Forest from Everlund's western roads.
Cross a guarded magical portal under local permission and warding rites.
Leave Silverymoon westbound toward Mirabar and the mining road.
Follow the Rauvin corridor from Silverymoon toward Everlund.
Climb from the Rauvin lands toward Citadel Felbarr's guarded gates.
Travel south from Silverymoon toward the old forest's northern reaches.
Cross the Rauvin lands above road and river traffic.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Silverymoon.
Cross a guarded magical portal under local permission and warding rites.
Leave Sundabar and head west toward Everlund.
Take the hard northern road from Sundabar toward Citadel Adbar.
Cross the Rauvin lands above road and river traffic.
Descend from Citadel Felbarr toward Silverymoon and lower roads.
Leave Citadel Adbar and follow the guarded road back toward Sundabar.
Leave Mithral Hall's mountain approaches and return toward Mirabar.
Descend from the high passes toward Mirabar and the Long Road.
Cross into Icewind Dale and make for Bryn Shander's walls.
Leave Bryn Shander and climb toward the southern mountain pass.
Follow the frozen road toward the dark waters of Maer Dualdon.
Fly north over white tundra and broken ice.
Cross Maer Dualdon by swimming magic, aquatic mounts, or cold-water endurance.
Return from Maer Dualdon across wind-scoured roads to Bryn Shander.
Cross Maer Dualdon by swimming magic, aquatic mounts, or cold-water endurance.
Find the western trail out of the wood toward Neverwinter.
Pick a dry route back toward Triboar's roads.
Work west through the moor until Yartar's river trade returns.
Leave the High Forest by the eastern trails toward Everlund.
Find the northern trail from the High Forest back toward Silverymoon.
Climb through thin winds toward the Star Mounts.
Use an old elven waygate through green-lit extradimensional paths.
Climb through thin winds toward the Star Mounts.
Find the road out of the mist toward Daggerford.
Leave Cloak Wood and return to the roads around Baldur's Gate.
Return from the forest edge toward Baldur's Gate.
Leave the forest trails and return toward Elturel.
Pick a way south from the Trollclaws toward Scornubel.
Follow the forest road back toward Scornubel's caravans.
Trace the waterway south toward Scornubel.
Leave the Greycloak Hills and return toward Iriaebor's roads.
Find the trade route that cuts toward Anauroch.
Leave the desert road westbound toward the Greycloak Hills.
Cross the hard trade route into Anauroch's wide desert.
Find the marked trade road out of Anauroch's waste.
Descend from the Sunset Mountains toward Iriaebor.
Work through high passes toward Cormyr's Storm Horns.
Leave the Storm Horns westward toward the Sunset Mountains.
Descend into Cormyr and follow guarded roads toward Suzail.
Leave Suzail's coast road and head inland toward the Storm Horns.
Follow Cormyr's caravan road north toward Arabel.
Follow the eastern shore routes from Suzail toward the Lake of Dragons.
Cross the Dragonmere waters without a boat.
Secure a circle casting between Waterdeep and Suzail.
Travel south from Arabel toward Suzail and the Dragonmere.
Leave Cormyr's road network toward the old forest of Cormanthor.
Travel from Arabel toward the wide waters of the Wyvernwater.
Make an exposed crossing of the Wyvernwater.
Find the western road from Cormanthor back toward Arabel.
Follow old forest tracks into Shadowdale.
Use an old elven waygate through green-lit extradimensional paths.
Leave Shadowdale for Cormanthor's deeper roads.
Trace the shore road back toward Suzail.
Cross the Dragonmere waters without a boat.
Leave the lakeshore and head back toward Arabel.
Make an exposed crossing of the Wyvernwater.
Make harbor at Waterdeep after the coastal passage.
Turn toward Neverwinter's harbor and warm river mouth.
Bring the ship into Luskan at the mouth of the Mirar.
Enter the Chionthar mouth and make for Baldur's Gate.
Turn toward Orlumbor and its shipwright docks.
Leave the coastal lanes for the wider Trackless Sea.
Cross open water toward Orlumbor by aquatic magic or mount.
Sail from Orlumbor's shipyards into the Sea of Swords.
Cross open water toward Orlumbor by aquatic magic or mount.
Find the eastern sea lanes back toward the Sword Coast.
Sail west toward the Moonshae Isles.
Hold a northern course toward Ruathym.
Sail for Gundarlun through cold northern lanes.
Aim for the remote Purple Rocks.
Sail toward Tuern's black volcanic shore.
Run a careful course toward the Nelanther Isles.
Leave the Moonshaes and set course across the Trackless Sea.
Leave Ruathym and return to the open western sea.
Depart Gundarlun and return to the Trackless Sea.
Leave the Purple Rocks and seek safer sea lanes.
Set sail from Tuern back into the Trackless Sea.
Leave the Nelanther Isles and rejoin open sea lanes.
Float west down the Chionthar toward Baldur's Gate.
Follow the Chionthar upriver toward Elturel.
Continue upriver toward Scornubel's busy landings.
Follow the Delimbiyr downstream back to Daggerford.
Pole inland along the Delimbiyr beside the valley route.
Return by protected water passage toward Waterdeep.
Travel upriver toward Yartar's guarded river trade.
Ride the Mirar's current back toward Luskan.
Follow the Mirar corridor inland toward Mirabar.
Fly north over white tundra and broken ice.
